author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Decision: Change Conv2dBackward.cols from Vec<T> to Tensor<T>. During forward, after im2col produces the column matrix on GPU, wrap it as a Tensor and store it in the grad_fn. During backward, the cols are already on GPU and can be used directly for the matmuls (grad_weight = grad_output @ cols^T, grad_input via weight^T @ grad_output → col2im).

This requires: (1) changing the cols field type, (2) updating forward to store cols as Tensor, (3) updating backward to use Tensor ops instead of raw data access.
